name: Mapled Acorn Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard the squash tops and bottoms.
2. Cut into 1/2-inch rings.
3. Using a biscuit cutter, cut out the center from each slice.
4. Place into a glass baking dish, overlapping edges slightly. Season with salt and white pepper.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and microwave on high for 4 minutes.
6. Remove plastic and turn the slices over.
7. Cover with plastic wrap again and microwave on high for another 4 minutes, or until tender.
8. Remove from the microwave and let rest on the countertop for 5-6 minutes.
9. Drain well and set aside.
10. In a small saucepan, combine butter and maple syrup. Heat over a low flame and stir until well combined.
11. Brush squash rings generously with the maple mixture.
12. Pass under the broiler for 2-3 minutes until glazed.
13. Garnish with nutmeg.
14. Serve hot.
